pi_items.source: Confirmed in setup_task.sh (lines 11, 30-32) and verifier.py (line 37). Matomo supports GBP as documented in https://fossies.org/linux/www/matomo-5.2.2.tar.gz/matomo/core/Intl/Data/Resources/currencies.php. Site created synthetically with wrong currency (USD) and must be corrected to GBP.
Confirmed in setup_task.sh (lines 11, 30-32) and verifier.py (line 39). Europe/London is a valid PHP/IANA timezone identifier as documented at https://www.php.net/manual/en/timezones.europe.php

Confirmed in setup_task.sh (line 30) where site is created with ecommerce=0 and must be enabled (set to 1). Matomo ecommerce tracking is a real feature documented at https://matomo.org/faq/reports/set-up-ecommerce-tracking-in-matomo/

Confirmed in setup_task.sh (lines 11, 34-36) and verifier.py (line 43). Matomo supports EUR as documented in https://fossies.org/linux/www/matomo-5.2.2.tar.gz/matomo/core/Intl/Data/Resources/currencies.php. Site created synthetically with wrong currency (USD) and must be corrected to EUR.
Confirmed in setup_task.sh (lines 11, 34-36) and verifier.py (line 45). Europe/Berlin is a valid PHP/IANA timezone identifier as documented at https://www.php.net/manual/en/timezones.europe.php

Confirmed in setup_task.sh (line 34) where site is created with ecommerce=0 and must be enabled (set to 1). Matomo ecommerce tracking is documented at https://matomo.org/faq/reports/set-up-ecommerce-tracking-in-matomo/

Confirmed in setup_task.sh (lines 11, 38-40) and verifier.py (line 49). Matomo supports JPY as documented in https://fossies.org/linux/www/matomo-5.2.2.tar.gz/matomo/core/Intl/Data/Resources/currencies.php. Site created synthetically with wrong currency (USD) and must be corrected to JPY.
Confirmed in setup_task.sh (lines 11, 38-40) and verifier.py (line 50). Asia/Tokyo is a valid PHP/IANA timezone identifier as referenced in PHP timezone documentation.

Confirmed in setup_task.sh (line 38) where site is created with ecommerce=0 and must be enabled (set to 1). Matomo ecommerce tracking is documented at https://matomo.org/faq/reports/set-up-ecommerce-tracking-in-matomo/

Confirmed in setup_task.sh (lines 15-20) where 'Initial Site' is created as a control site that must not be modified. Also verified in export_result.sh (lines 43-44) which checks Initial Site's baseline configuration.
Confirmed in setup_task.sh (lines 30, 34, 38) where all three regional sites are initially seeded with wrong_currency='USD'. Also documented in task description and verifier.py.

Confirmed in setup_task.sh (lines 30, 34, 38) where all three regional sites are initially seeded with timezone='America/New_York'. America/New_York is a valid IANA timezone identifier documented at https://www.php.net/manual/en/timezones.america.php
Confirmed in verifier.py (line 144) where correct UK currency earns 10 points. Also documented in task.json (line 38).
Confirmed in verifier.py (line 158) where correct UK timezone earns 10 points. Also documented in task.json (line 39).
Confirmed in verifier.py (line 172) where enabling UK ecommerce earns 5 points. Also documented in task.json (line 40).
Confirmed in verifier.py (line 144) where correct German currency earns 10 points. Also documented in task.json (line 41).
Confirmed in verifier.py (line 158) where correct German timezone earns 10 points. Also documented in task.json (line 42).
Confirmed in verifier.py (line 172) where enabling German ecommerce earns 5 points. Also documented in task.json (line 43).
Confirmed in verifier.py (line 144) where correct Japanese currency earns 10 points. Also documented in task.json (line 44).
Confirmed in verifier.py (line 158) where correct Japanese timezone earns 10 points. Also documented in task.json (line 45).
Confirmed in verifier.py (line 172) where enabling Japanese ecommerce earns 5 points. Also documented in task.json (line 46).
Confirmed in verifier.py (lines 184-187) where completing all three sites correctly earns a 25-point bonus. Also documented in task.json (line 48).

privileged_info_summary: The task requires correcting configuration for three synthetically-created regional e-commerce websites in a Matomo instance. UK Fashion Store must be set to GBP currency, Europe/London timezone, and ecommerce enabled. German Auto Parts must be set to EUR currency, Europe/Berlin timezone, and ecommerce enabled. Tokyo Electronics must be set to JPY currency, Asia/Tokyo timezone, and ecommerce enabled. All three sites are initially seeded with incorrect settings: USD currency, America/New_York timezone, and ecommerce disabled. A control site named 'Initial Site' must not be modified. Scoring: 10 points each for correct currency and timezone, 5 points for enabling ecommerce on each site, with a 25-point bonus if all three are completely correct. Pass threshold is 70+ points.
